stories.name: i18n-strings
stories.title: i18n strings for admin role management
stories.description: Extend the Copy type and both en/de language objects in app/src/lib/i18n.ts with all new keys required by this epic: makeAdminButton, makeAdminTitle, makeAdminBody, makeAdminConfirm, adminBadge, lastAdminLeaveBlocked, leavePendingBadge, removalPendingBadge. No UI or logic changes. Provides the i18n foundation all downstream stories depend on.

includes: app/src/lib/i18n.ts — add makeAdminButton, makeAdminTitle, makeAdminBody, makeAdminConfirm, adminBadge, lastAdminLeaveBlocked, leavePendingBadge, removalPendingBadge to Copy type and both en/de objects

stories.name: remove-auto-promote
stories.title: Remove auto-promote block and dead code from MarmotContext
stories.description: Delete the promote-to-admin-on-invite block at MarmotContext.tsx:1169-1187, the adminPromotionFailed warning return path, the inviteWarningAdminPromotion i18n key (en + de), and the warning display in InviteMemberModal.tsx. After this story, inviteByNpub commits the MLS Add only — no adminPubkeys side-effect. This is a pure deletion; the invariant that invited members join as regular members is now enforceable. Protects AC-INIT-1/2 by confirming the create path was already correct and remains untouched.

includes: app/src/context/MarmotContext.tsx — delete lines 1169-1187 (auto-promote block), adminPromotionFailed return path, and any associated comment scaffolding
app/src/lib/i18n.ts — remove inviteWarningAdminPromotion key from Copy type and both en/de objects
app/src/components/groups/InviteMemberModal.tsx — remove warning display block that consumed inviteWarningAdminPromotion (lines 73-80)

stories.name: grant-admin-impl
stories.title: grantAdminImpl and MarmotContext grantAdmin / getPendingRemovals
stories.description: Create app/src/lib/marmot/grantAdminImpl.ts as a pure Deps-injected implementation mirroring cancelInvitationImpl.ts. It re-reads live adminPubkeys at commit time, enforces the superset guard (rejects any update that would demote an existing admin), builds a Proposals.proposeUpdateMetadata, and issues a single mlsGroup.commit(). Wire it into MarmotContext as grantAdmin(groupId, pubkey) and add getPendingRemovals(groupId) accessor that reads pendingRemovalsRef synchronously. Handle the retry loop for concurrent grants (AC-GRANT-7). Also enforce admin guard in fireAutoCommit so a non-admin's pass is a guarded no-op that retains entries.

includes: app/src/lib/marmot/grantAdminImpl.ts — new file; zero imports from app/src/context/; Deps interface injected; superset guard; single commit discipline; dynamic import of marmot-ts inside callback

app/src/context/MarmotContext.tsx — add grantAdmin(groupId, pubkey): Promise<{ok:boolean; error?:string}> calling grantAdminImpl; add getPendingRemovals(groupId): string[] reading pendingRemovalsRef; guard fireAutoCommit so non-admin pass retains queue entries without committing; update remainingAdmins computation to filter departing pubkey
app/tests/unit/marmot/grantAdminImpl.test.ts — unit tests: happy path, superset guard rejects demotion, concurrent-retry merges both pubkeys, non-admin fireAutoCommit is a no-op that retains entries

introduces_mocks.description: marmot-ts mlsGroup.commit, Proposals.proposeUpdateMetadata mocked in unit tests for grantAdminImpl

stories.name: member-list-admin-ui
stories.title: MemberList: Admin badge, Make admin button+dialog, pending-removal badge
stories.description: Extend MemberList.tsx with four new prop-driven UI elements: (1) Admin badge on each row whose pubkey is in adminPubkeys, (2) Make admin button visible only to admins on confirmed non-admin non-self rows, (3) Confirmation dialog stating the action is irreversible — dismissing without confirming produces no commit, (4) leave/removal pending badge for members in pendingRemovalPubkeys. All new props arrive from parent; zero useMarmot() or useContext calls are added. i18n keys from S1 used exclusively via useCopy().

includes: app/src/components/groups/MemberList.tsx — add adminPubkeys?: string[], isCurrentUserAdmin?: boolean, onMakeAdmin?: (pubkey: string) => Promise<void>, pendingRemovalPubkeys?: string[] props; render Admin badge, Make admin button (gated: isCurrentUserAdmin && !isAdmin(row) && !isYou(row) && isConfirmed(row)), Chakra confirmation modal (makeAdminTitle/Body/Confirm copy), leave/removal pending badge (leavePendingBadge / removalPendingBadge); zero new useMarmot() or useContext calls
excludes: i18n key definitions (S1 — keys must exist before this story)

mock_dependencies: S1 — i18n keys must be present in i18n.ts
S3 — onMakeAdmin prop signature derived from grantAdmin return shape

stories.name: leave-group-last-admin-guard
stories.title: LeaveGroupButton last-admin guard
stories.description: Extend LeaveGroupButton.tsx with two new props (adminPubkeys, ownPubkeyHex) and a last-admin guard: if adminPubkeys.length === 1 and the sole entry matches ownPubkeyHex, the leave flow is blocked and the lastAdminLeaveBlocked copy is shown instead of the confirmation. No leave commit or kind-13 event is emitted. Once a second admin exists the normal leave flow resumes unchanged.

includes: app/src/components/groups/LeaveGroupButton.tsx — add adminPubkeys?: string[] and ownPubkeyHex?: string | null props; implement last-admin check (adminPubkeys.length === 1 && adminPubkeys[0].toLowerCase() === ownPubkeyHex?.toLowerCase()); show lastAdminLeaveBlocked copy and suppress normal confirmation when blocked

mock_dependencies: S1 — lastAdminLeaveBlocked i18n key must exist

stories.name: groups-page-wiring
stories.title: groups.tsx: wire adminPubkeys, onMakeAdmin, pendingRemovalPubkeys, last-admin props
stories.description: Wire the new context methods and derived state into groups.tsx GroupDetailView. Derive adminPubkeys from mlsGroup?.groupData?.adminPubkeys ?? [], isCurrentUserAdmin from adminPubkeys.includes(ownPubkeyHex), and pendingRemovalPubkeys via getPendingRemovals(groupId) on each groupDataVersion tick. Implement onMakeAdmin handler that calls grantAdmin and shows toast feedback. Pass adminPubkeys, isCurrentUserAdmin, onMakeAdmin (only if isCurrentUserAdmin), and pendingRemovalPubkeys to MemberList; pass adminPubkeys and ownPubkeyHex to LeaveGroupButton. The pendingRemovalsRef read on groupDataVersion ticks is what enables AC-PENDING-5 (reload reconstruction).

includes: app/pages/groups.tsx — derive adminPubkeys, isCurrentUserAdmin, pendingRemovalPubkeys; implement onMakeAdmin handler (calls grantAdmin, shows success/error toast); pass new props to MemberList and LeaveGroupButton; call getPendingRemovals on groupDataVersion tick

mock_dependencies: S3 — grantAdmin and getPendingRemovals must be on MarmotContextValue
S4 — MemberList must accept new props
S5 — LeaveGroupButton must accept new props

stories.name: e2e-admin-role-management
stories.title: E2E tests for admin role management
stories.description: Rewrite app/tests/e2e/groups-admin.spec.ts (currently tests auto-promotion behavior that is removed). New serial test suite covers: (1) invited member joins as non-admin (no Admin badge, no action buttons visible), (2) non-admin sees no Make admin buttons on any row, (3) admin grants admin to a confirmed member — target gains Admin badge and can subsequently invite, (4) last-admin leave is blocked with explanation copy, (5) once a second admin exists the original admin can leave normally, (6) pending-removal badge appears on self-left member and persists across page reload (AC-PENDING-5). Two browser contexts per scenario; all publishes go through the app, never raw WebSocket. AC-GRANT-7 concurrent no-clobber is covered by the unit test in S3; a best-effort manual validation note is preserved from Manual Validation section MV-1.

includes: app/tests/e2e/groups-admin.spec.ts — full rewrite; test.describe.serial(); two-context pattern; covers: invited-member-is-non-admin, non-admin-sees-no-action-buttons, grant-makes-target-admin, last-admin-leave-blocked, second-admin-allows-leave, pending-removal-badge-survives-reload
excludes: Production code (all production work done in S1–S6)
AC-GRANT-7 concurrent e2e load scenario (manual validation MV-1)

mock_dependencies: S1 through S6 — all production features must be complete before e2e is meaningful

dependency_notes: Linear order. S1 (i18n) provides copy keys for all component stories. S2 (remove auto-promote) establishes the invariant that S3's grantAdmin method maintains. S3 (grantAdminImpl + context integration) provides grantAdmin and getPendingRemovals methods that S6 wires. S4 (MemberList UI) and S5 (LeaveGroupButton guard) are independently implementable after S1 and can be done in parallel with S3, but S6 depends on all of S3/S4/S5. S7 (E2E) requires all prior stories complete.

seams.data: Copy type extensions (makeAdminButton, makeAdminTitle, makeAdminBody, makeAdminConfirm, adminBadge, lastAdminLeaveBlocked, leavePendingBadge, removalPendingBadge)

invariants: Each key has a non-empty string value in both en and de language objects
Each key is declared in the Copy type before being referenced in any component
leavePendingBadge and removalPendingBadge MUST NOT assert message delivery has stopped
Key exists in Copy type and both en/de objects before S5 is implemented

fields.name: grantAdmin
fields.type: (groupId: string, pubkey: string) => Promise<{ ok: boolean; error?: string }>

invariants: grantAdmin resolves { ok: true } on success, { ok: false, error: string } on guard rejection or commit failure
grantAdmin re-reads live adminPubkeys at fire time, never a stale snapshot
grantAdmin rejects any update where new set is not a superset of live current set
getPendingRemovals is synchronous and reads pendingRemovalsRef directly
getPendingRemovals returns hex pubkeys only (no other identifier format)
A non-admin call to fireAutoCommit MUST NOT commit and MUST retain queue entries

seams.data: MemberList new props (adminPubkeys, isCurrentUserAdmin, onMakeAdmin, pendingRemovalPubkeys)

invariants: MemberList renders no Make admin button when isCurrentUserAdmin is false or undefined
MemberList renders no Make admin button for the current user's own row
MemberList renders no Make admin button for rows already in adminPubkeys
MemberList renders no Make admin button for pending (unconfirmed) rows
MemberList renders Admin badge for every pubkey in adminPubkeys
MemberList renders leave/removal pending badge for every pubkey in pendingRemovalPubkeys
MemberList contains zero useMarmot() or useContext calls
When adminPubkeys.length === 1 and adminPubkeys[0].toLowerCase() === ownPubkeyHex?.toLowerCase(), leave is blocked — no kind-13 emitted, no confirmation shown
When adminPubkeys has two or more entries, normal leave flow is unchanged
Case-insensitive pubkey comparison is used
